articles.title: XRP Trading Volume Soars in South Korea, Surpassing Bitcoin and Ethereum
articles.description: XRP has seen an unprecedented surge in trading activity on South Korea’s leading cryptocurrency exchanges, surpassing Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) with over $1 billion in 24-hour trading volume. articles.title: Cardano's Future Under Community Control After Chang Hard Fork
articles.description: According to BlockBeats, on January 1, Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson stated that he has remained committed to the original roadmap throughout his decade-long contribution to the ecosystem. With the implementation of the Chang hard fork upgrade, Cardano is now under the control of community members.
